signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly High, Strongest Since January, Driving Price to $2,288 Amid Institutional Return** | YE
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly High, Strongest Since January, Driving Price to $2,288 Amid Institutional Return** | YES | HIGH  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the highest since January 2026—led by Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA, coinciding with a 7% ETH price rise to near $2,400 before settling at $2,288.[1] This marks confirmed institutional demand resurgence,
matched_markets: Ethereum Up or Down - April 23, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET
